THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF BENITA LOPEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK DAVIS IS PRESENT. AT THE TIME OF ROLL CALL, PLAINTIFF REQUESTED THIS MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, BENITA AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED APR-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, PATRICK
